en: Ha! Gotcha! Don't be afraid, little Snipe.
ko: 무서워하지 마, 작은 스나이프. 착한 스나이프.

en: I am a wilderness explorer, so I'm a friend to all of nature.
ko: 나는 야생 탐험가야, 그래서 모든 자연의 친구야.

en: Don't eat it all. Come on out.
Don't be afraid, little Snipe. Nice, Snipe.
ko: 무서워하지 마, 작은 스나이프. 착한 스나이프.

en: I found the Snipe! Oh, did you?
Are they tall? Oh, yes, they're very tall.
Do they have a lot of colors? They do indeed.
Do they like chocolate? Oh, yeah. Chocolate.
ko: 정말 그래요. 초콜릿 좋아해? 오, 네.

en: Ah! What is that thing? It's a Snipe!
There's no such thing as a Snipe! But you said Snipes eat carrots.
ko: 스나이프 같은 건 없어. 하지만 너가 스나이프라고 했잖아.
